Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 74 

NN_NVGTD_CORE_UTILITIES_SW 

LABEL: Navigated Core HRSN Utilities Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: Navigation needs (NN): navigated core health related social need (HRSN) utilities indicator. 

LONG NAME: NN_NVGTD_CORE_UTILITIES_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Missing 

COMMENT: Variables that start with “NN” include information for each
